context: Tests whether the agent follows AccessorySetupKit migration sequencing and avoids the CoreBluetooth initialization gotcha.

checklist.name: Migration item
checklist.description: Uses ASMigrationDisplayItem for existing accessories rather than normal ASPickerDisplayItem only.

checklist.name: Peripheral ID
checklist.description: Sets the migration item's peripheralIdentifier from the existing CBPeripheral or CBPeer identifier.

checklist.name: Descriptor included
checklist.description: Creates a discovery descriptor for the migrated accessory type with Bluetooth values aligned to property-list declarations.

checklist.name: No early central
checklist.description: Explicitly says not to initialize CBCentralManager before migration completes.

checklist.name: Prototype fix
checklist.description: The Startup changes section removes or defers the prototype's app-start CBCentralManager creation.

checklist.name: Migration event
checklist.description: Handles migrationComplete as the point where migration has finished.

checklist.name: Session activation
checklist.description: Activates ASAccessorySession before showing the migration picker and handles events through the session handler.

checklist.name: Picker behavior
checklist.description: Mentions that a picker containing only migration items shows an informational migration page rather than normal discovery.

checklist.name: Resume BLE
checklist.description: Explains that normal CoreBluetooth communication resumes only after migration is complete, using the authorized accessory information.

checklist.name: Scoped output
checklist.description: Does not add unrelated UI architecture or a full app implementation beyond the requested migration plan and snippets.
